  • Introduction to National Infrastructure Planning Guidance — detailed guide · action · s. 9 Examination of applications for development consent

Natural England content team

  • Developers: get environmental advice on your planning proposals — detailed guide · action · s. 6 Applications for development consent: changes related to section 5

entry.content:
Legislative change

Higher Education (Freedom of Speech) Act 2023

https://www.legislation.gov.uk/ukpga/2023/16

Commencement: 2026-09-01 (for specified purposes)

Start content work by: no deadline computed

Monitoring for change

No pages need active review yet — listed here so the change is on the radar (a signal to watch, not a verdict).

  • Protecting UK higher education from foreign interference
  • New powers to protect vital free speech at universities
  • Government reaffirms commitment to Free Speech in universities
  • Government watchdog to help stabilise university finances
  • Free speech rules to protect academic freedom come into force
  • Universities to comply with free speech duties or face sanctions
